evals.prompt: Собери семантическую базу ai_navigation для C:\Axis\CEV-Eris с нуля.
evals.expected_output: Runs Stage 0 assessment (family, subsystems, signals, overlay, tgui), builds only applicable files per file-specs.md in stage order, stamps generated inventories with date+command, validates with the script, registers the base in semantic-controller/SKILL.md, plans deployment as <repo>/ai_navigation.

evals.prompt: Мне нужно добавить новую TGUI-панель настроек погоды в C:\Axis\Rivermist-Hollow-Vanderlin. Составь план.
evals.expected_output: Discovers the repo's base via the Discovery protocol (in-repo ai_navigation, then workspace registry), produces a binding brief (ss13-tgui invariants + fork-local facts with source files + verification greps), lets code win over any stale base fact it hits.

evals.prompt: Проверь целостность всех трёх семантических баз и почини найденное.
evals.expected_output: Runs validate_semantic_base.py per base with correct --repo roots, distinguishes real drift from shorthand noise, fixes fast-tier files first, updates stamps, re-syncs deployed copies (diff -rq empty), updates parity notes in integrity.md.
